title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude Fable 5 played Pokémon FireRed to completion using only raw game screenshots without maps or navigation aids. This demonstrates improved visual reasoning capabilities compared to earlier Claude models, which required complex helper harnesses to play the same game.
writeup: The video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots, without maps or navigation aids. It matters as a concrete benchmark of visual reasoning: earlier Claude models needed complex helper harnesses to play the same game, so the vision-only completion marks a measurable improvement in scene understanding and multimodal reasoning. The key takeaway is that the model navigated and finished the game from pixels alone.
